---
title: "SupplementalFigureX"
output: html_document
date: "2026-01-17"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Generate Supplemental Figure X
Bootstrap gene level BMDs (as many times as the sig HALLMARK pathways) and compare correlation

```{r}
load(file.path(getwd(), "output", "EUT046", "WrangledInput", "WrangledInputData.RData"))

```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(purrr)
```



## Significant number of overlapping pathways per timepoint
```{r}

pairwise_overlap_cor <- function(df,
                                 id_col,
                                 value_col,
                                 timepoint_col,
                                 partner_a,
                                 partner_b,
                                 timepoint,
                                 method = "pearson",
                                 collapse_fun = median,
                                 debug = FALSE) {
  tp <- as.character(timepoint)
  
  # Helper to filter + collapse to one row per id
  prep_one <- function(d, partner_name, value_name) {
    d %>%
      filter(partner == partner_name, as.character(.data[[timepoint_col]]) == tp) %>%
      select(id = .data[[id_col]], val = .data[[value_col]]) %>%
      filter(!is.na(id)) %>%
      group_by(id) %>%
      summarise(!!value_name := collapse_fun(val, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
  }
  
  a <- prep_one(df, partner_a, rlang::sym("val_a"))
  b <- prep_one(df, partner_b, rlang::sym("val_b"))
  
  # Explicit overlap set + joined values
  joined <- a %>%
    semi_join(b, by = "id") %>%
    inner_join(b, by = "id")
  
  n <- nrow(joined)
  
  if (debug) {
    message("timepoint = ", tp)
    message("n_a pathways (collapsed) = ", nrow(a))
    message("n_b pathways (collapsed) = ", nrow(b))
    message("n_overlap = ", n)
    if (n > 0) {
      message("example overlap ids: ", paste(head(joined$id, 5), collapse = ", "))
    }
  }
  
  if (n < 3) {
    return(list(
      cor = NA_real_,
      n = n,
      joined = joined
    ))
  }
  
  r <- suppressWarnings(cor(
    joined$val_a,
    joined$val_b,
    method = method,
    use = "complete.obs"
  ))
  list(cor = r, n = n, joined = joined)
}
#-----------------------------
# Main: for one partner pair + one timepoint, compare:
#  - observed pathway correlation (overlapping pathways)
#  - bootstrap gene correlation using SAME n as pathway overlap
#-----------------------------
compare_pathway_vs_gene_bootstrap <- function(gene_df,
                                              pathway_df,
                                              partner_a,
                                              partner_b,
                                              timepoint,
                                              B = 2000,
                                              method = "pearson",
                                              timepoint_col = "timepoint",
                                              gene_pool = c("overlap_sig_genes", "overlap_all_genes", "all_genes")) {
  gene_pool <- match.arg(gene_pool)
  
  # 1) Observed pathway correlation on overlapping pathways (no significance filter)
  pw <- pairwise_overlap_cor(
    df = pathway_df,
    id_col = "Pathway.Name",
    value_col = "medianBMD",
    timepoint_col = timepoint_col,
    partner_a = partner_a,
    partner_b = partner_b,
    timepoint = timepoint,
    method = method,
    collapse_fun = median,
    # or dplyr::first, mean, etc.
    debug = FALSE
  )
  
  
  r_pathway <- pw$cor
  n_pathways <- pw$n
  
  if (is.na(r_pathway) || n_pathways < 3) {
    return(
      tibble(
        timepoint = timepoint,
        partner_a = partner_a,
        partner_b = partner_b,
        n_pathways = n_pathways,
        r_pathway = r_pathway,
        gene_pool = gene_pool,
        B = B,
        r_gene_mean = NA_real_,
        r_gene_q025 = NA_real_,
        r_gene_q975 = NA_real_,
        emp_p_two_sided = NA_real_
      )
    )
  }
  
  # 2) Gene-level paired table, restricted to same timepoint
  ga <- gene_df %>%
    filter(partner == partner_a,
           !!rlang::sym(timepoint_col) == timepoint) %>%
    select(gene_symbol_entrez_id, BMD_a = finalBMD, sig_a = significant)
  
  gb <- gene_df %>%
    filter(partner == partner_b,
           !!rlang::sym(timepoint_col) == timepoint) %>%
    select(gene_symbol_entrez_id, BMD_b = finalBMD, sig_b = significant)
  
  g_join <- inner_join(ga, gb, by = "gene_symbol_entrez_id")
  
  # Choose sampling pool
  g_pool <- switch(
    gene_pool,
    overlap_sig_genes = g_join %>% filter(sig_a & sig_b),
    overlap_all_genes = g_join,
    all_genes = g_join
  )
  
  if (nrow(g_pool) < 3) {
    return(
      tibble(
        timepoint = timepoint,
        partner_a = partner_a,
        partner_b = partner_b,
        n_pathways = n_pathways,
        r_pathway = r_pathway,
        gene_pool = gene_pool,
        B = B,
        r_gene_mean = NA_real_,
        r_gene_q025 = NA_real_,
        r_gene_q975 = NA_real_,
        emp_p_two_sided = NA_real_
      )
    )
  }
  
  sample_replace <- nrow(g_pool) < n_pathways
  
  # 3) Bootstrap
  set.seed(1)
  r_gene <- replicate(B, {
    idx <- sample.int(nrow(g_pool), size = n_pathways, replace = sample_replace)
    dat <- g_pool[idx, ]
    suppressWarnings(cor(dat$BMD_a, dat$BMD_b, method = method, use = "complete.obs"))
  })
  
  r_gene <- r_gene[is.finite(r_gene)]
  emp_p <- mean(abs(r_gene) >= abs(r_pathway))
  
  tibble(
    timepoint = timepoint,
    partner_a = partner_a,
    partner_b = partner_b,
    n_pathways = n_pathways,
    r_pathway = r_pathway,
    gene_pool = gene_pool,
    B = B,
    r_gene_mean = mean(r_gene),
    r_gene_q025 = quantile(r_gene, 0.025, names = FALSE),
    r_gene_q975 = quantile(r_gene, 0.975, names = FALSE),
    emp_p_two_sided = emp_p
  )
}

#-----------------------------
# Run for many partner pairs, across ALL timepoints
#-----------------------------
run_all_pairs <- function(gene_df,
                          pathway_df,
                          partners,
                          B = 2000,
                          method = "pearson",
                          timepoint_col = "timepoint",
                          gene_pool = "overlap_sig_genes") {
  pairs <- combn(partners, 2, simplify = FALSE)
  timepoints <- sort(unique(pathway_df[[timepoint_col]]))
  
  purrr::map_dfr(timepoints, function(tp) {
    purrr::map_dfr(pairs, function(p) {
      compare_pathway_vs_gene_bootstrap(
        gene_df = gene_df,
        pathway_df = pathway_df,
        partner_a = p[1],
        partner_b = p[2],
        timepoint = tp,
        B = B,
        method = method,
        timepoint_col = timepoint_col,
        gene_pool = gene_pool
      )
    })
  })
}


```


```{r, warning=FALSE}
set.seed(42)

partners <- unique(norm_HALLMARK_combined$partner)

res <- run_all_pairs(
  gene_df = norm_BMD_combined %>% mutate(significant = TRUE),  # keep for gene_pool filtering
  pathway_df = norm_HALLMARK_combined,                         # no significant needed
  partners = partners,
  B = 1000,
  method = "pearson",
  timepoint_col = "timepoint",
  gene_pool = "overlap_sig_genes"
)

res

data.table::fwrite(res, file.path(getwd(), "output", "EUT046", "pathway_vs_gene_correlations_same_n.txt"))

```

Generate figure
```{r}

# If you want an explicit "difference" column too:
res_plot <- res %>%
  mutate(
    pair = paste(partner_a, "vs", partner_b),
    diff_pathway_minus_gene = r_pathway - r_gene_mean
  )

ggplot(res_plot, aes(x = pair)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  # Bootstrap gene expectation (mean + 95% interval)
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = r_gene_q025, ymax = r_gene_q975), width = 0.2) +
  geom_point(aes(y = r_gene_mean), size = 2) +
  # Observed pathway correlation
  geom_point(aes(y = r_pathway), shape = 4, size = 3, stroke = 1) +
  coord_flip() +
  facet_wrap(~ timepoint, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Correlation",
    title = "Observed pathway correlation vs gene-bootstrap expectation",
    subtitle = "X = r_pathway, dot+CI = bootstrap gene mean and 95% interval (same n as overlapping pathways)"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(face = "italic", hjust = 0.5))

ggsave(file.path(getwd(), "figures", "EUT046", "SupplementalFigureX.pdf"), width=10, height=7)

```
